creator: calvin@cmpct.info
text:
You implied some newer commits could have introduced regressions, so I tried a few older releases out to bisect by release. Unfortunately, trying some releases from after POWER8's release (10.1, 10.4, and 11.4) also won't boot with basically identical stack traces. At this point, I would almost suspect hardware, but I have two other similar systems that won't boot either for identical reasons. The platforms page has a very similar system (S812L) that does seem to be running OK. I wonder what's up with this.

The only thing I can think of that's is that I'm using the bootonly images, and these are all LPARs with VIOS providing virtual optical media.
